goal:
System Role & Objective:
You are an expert agentic software engineer, UX/UI designer, and cloud solutions architect. Your objective is to build a production-ready, interactive enterprise pre-sales platform called the "Sovereign Solutions Canvas" (SSC). This tool will be used by Systems Integration (SI) sales engineers in the Middle East to dynamically generate, visualize, and validate compliant IT architectures in live client meetings.

Core Tech Stack (Strict Constraints):

Frontend Framework: React + Vite.

2D Logic & Visualization: React Flow (for interactive node-based architecture diagramming).

3D Visualization: React Three Fiber (R3F) and Three.js (for rendering photorealistic data centers, server racks, and geographical data flows).

Styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (for sleek, enterprise-grade glassmorphic UI components).

Generative UI / AI Integration: Vercel AI SDK or assistant-ui (to parse user prompts into structured JSON that dynamically mounts React Flow nodes and R3F components).

State Management: Zustand (to sync state perfectly between the 2D React Flow layer and the 3D R3F layer).

Design Language & "Vibe":

Theme: Premium, high-tech enterprise. Use a dark mode palette (deep navy/black backgrounds, subtle glowing accents in cyan, emerald, and sovereign green).

Layout: A split-screen or flexible dashboard.

Left panel: A chat/prompt interface for the AI agent.

Center/Top: The 2D React Flow canvas (Engineering View).

Center/Bottom (or togglable): The 3D React Three Fiber scene (Executive View).

Right panel: A real-time metrics dashboard showing Cost, Carbon Footprint, and Compliance Status.

Core Features to Implement:

1. The Vibe-Coding AI Assistant (Generative UI):

Build a chat interface where a user can type natural language (e.g., "Add a localized PostgreSQL database and connect it to a secure GenAI gateway").

The AI must return structured JSON that instantly generates a new Node in React Flow and a corresponding 3D asset in React Three Fiber.

2. The 2D Architecture Canvas (React Flow):

Create custom React Flow nodes styled with Tailwind representing specific SI capabilities:

Cloud & Infra: Secure Landing Zones, Kubernetes Clusters, Edge Nodes.

Data & AI: Lakehouses, Local LLMs (Falcon 3/DeepSeek), BI Dashboards.

App Dev: Microservices, API Gateways, Event Brokers.

Implement animated, glowing edges (connections) between nodes to simulate data flow.

3. The 3D Executive Canvas (React Three Fiber):

Render a 3D environment that listens to the React Flow state. If a "Sovereign Data Center" node is added in 2D, spawn a 3D server rack or a glowing dot on a 3D globe (using react-globe.gl or Three.js primitives).

Show data flows as 3D particle animations moving between assets.

4. Real-Time Sovereign Compliance Engine:

Implement a logic validator. If the user connects a "Highly Sensitive Government Data" node to a "Public Cloud (US Region)" node, the connection edge must turn Red, and a warning toast must appear citing "Violation: KSA PDPL / UAE AI Act Data Residency rules."

Suggesting a "Sovereign Local AI" fix must turn the dashboard indicators Green.

5. The "Execution Blueprint" Generator (Hot Sales Stage):

Add an "Export Blueprint" button.

When clicked, it must parse the current React Flow graph and generate a clean UI view containing:

A Bill of Materials (BoM).

An estimated Carbon Footprint/Power Compute Effectiveness (PCE) score.

An automated compliance certification checklist.

Phased Execution Plan (Do not build all at once; follow these steps):

Phase 1 (Scaffolding): Initialize the Next.js app, configure Tailwind, and build the shell layout (Sidebar, main canvas area, right metrics panel).

Phase 2 (2D Logic): Integrate React Flow. Build 3 custom node types and enable drag-and-drop connectivity.

Phase 3 (3D Sync): Integrate React Three Fiber. Create a basic 3D scene that automatically adds a 3D box/server every time a React Flow node is created, syncing their states via Zustand.

Phase 4 (AI UI): Build the chat interface and mock the AI tool-calling function so typing a command updates the global state.

Phase 5 (Polish & Compliance): Add the red/green compliance logic for connections, the glowing edge animations, and the final Blueprint export UI.
